message:
fix(transport): weighted round-robin select_n advances by 1 slot per selection, not by weight span

The weighted_endpoint_index_for_slot consumed_slots counter was
incrementing by the matched endpoint's weight span instead of 1,
causing the selection to skip forward by the weight of each
selected endpoint.  This biased the distribution away from heavy
endpoints in multi-selection calls because the counter jumped
past their weight range after the first hit.

Fix: increment consumed_slots by 1 after each selection so the
counter advances uniformly through the cumulative weight ring.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
